full_text:
Lou Xuan (Chengxian) 樓玄 (承先)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Lou Xuan (樓玄), styledChengxian (承先), was born in from Peijun in Dongwu. Executed for rebuking Sun Hao about his tyranny. Lou Xuan was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
